flowchart TD
    Start([Start]) --> InitSecrets[/"SECRETS = Secrets()"/]
    InitSecrets --> DBConn["DB_CONN = FvDatabaseConnector('create_shipments', SecretNames.DATABASE, autocommit=False)"]
    DBConn --> EstablishConn["DB_CONN.establish_connection()"]

    MaybeSetOrg -- yes --> SetOrg["authorizer.setOrganizationId(creatorOrgId)"]
    MaybeSetOrg -- no --> SkipOrg
    SetOrg --> EventPrep
    SkipOrg --> EventPrep
    EventPrep["event = CanonicalEvent().setAuthorizer(authorizer)\\n.setHttpMethod('GET')\\n.prepare().toAwsEvent()"] --> FetchShipment["shipment, _ = db_no_orm.get_existing_shipments(DB_CONN.cursor, creatorId, carrierId, shipmentId)"]

    ComputeParams --> WriteAsn["AsnOrder.write(requestId, lambdaLevel, actorId, actorEmail, principalId, action, shipment._asdict(), references)"]
    WriteAsn --> PrintShipment["print(shipment)"]
    PrintShipment --> End([End])

## Diagram 2

```mermaid
classDiagram
    class Secrets {
        +Secrets()
        +get(name)
    }
    class FvDatabaseConnector {
        +FvDatabaseConnector(name, secretName, autocommit=False)
        +establish_connection()
        +cursor
    }
    class Authorizer {
        +Authorizer()
        +setUsername(email)
        +syncFromAuth0()
        +setActorType(type)
        +setOrganizationId(orgId)
    }
    class CanonicalEvent {
        +CanonicalEvent()
        +setAuthorizer(authorizer)
        +setHttpMethod(method)
        +prepare()
        +toAwsEvent()
    }
    class db_no_orm {
        +get_existing_shipments(cursor, creatorId, carrierId, shipmentId)
    }
    class AsnOrder {
        +write(requestId, lambdaLevel, actorId, actorEmail, principalId, action, shipmentDict, references)
    }
    Secrets <|-- SECRETS
    FvDatabaseConnector <|-- DB_CONN
    Authorizer <|-- authorizer
    CanonicalEvent <|-- event
    db_no_orm ..> FvDatabaseConnector : uses cursor
    AsnOrder ..> db_no_orm : reads shipment structure
    AsnOrder ..> Authorizer : uses principalId/actor info
    CanonicalEvent ..> Authorizer : contains authorizer info
```
